title: security-scanner inputs
description: Typed inputs for the security-scanner runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

target_org_alias.description: Example from AGENT.md: enables `validate_against_org` lookups Required column: 'no'.

severity_threshold.description: Example from AGENT.md: `P1` to hide low-severity findings Required column: 'no (default `p2`)'.
